g.title: resources
g.text: • Port rules → plain or pp session

g.title: route_controllers
g.text: • Listener carries the SessionKind; routes don't compute it

g.title: ssh_pool
g.text: • Hold up to 3 SSH Tunnel Managers
• Open/close PP and SNI sessions per

g.title: ssh_manager
g.text: • session label baked into every log line

g.title: principles
g.text: Gateway owns connection, Routes own forwardings, SSH manages primitives
Synchronous validation, return errors immediately, let Kubernetes retry
SSH Manager maintains authoritative state (forwardings + assignedAddrs)
Routes (10s) validate forwardings, Gateway (30s) checks connection
SSH Manager validates assigned hostname matches request (fails if wrong)
forwardings and assignedAddrs always cleaned together
